'''Shoaneb Culu's starship''' was the starship given to [[Shoaneb Culu]] at [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] which she used to pursue [[Aleema Keto]] and [[Crado]] into the [[Cron Cluster/Legends|Cron Cluster]]. When Aleema detonated the Cluster, Shoaneb's vessel was destroyed in a following supernova in The Cron Drift, Shoaneb got killed with it.<ref name="TOTJ4" />

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]]
